TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O ngangan no Onsing == O ngangan no Koyo han no 'Amis, tada adihay ko koyo i tokos saan no sowal to to'as. na i Wan-long-syang 萬榮鄉 ho ko aro' nangra i 'ayaw ho. nawhani malooday na Ponong ko niyaro' nangra , orasaka malinah satoko finawlan tonini a kapahay a pala. mamitao' ho ko Dipong to Taywan i ti:yaho, ma'araw nangra to Onsing hananay a sapitanektek to tirengay a nanom. haratengen han nangra samaanen kona Onsing hani ? saka mitahidangay to finawlan no 'Amis a mipadang a misanga' to Onsing a kinaira. saka mitahidangay to finawlan no 'Amis to mipadang ato misanga' to Onsing hanaynay a . o mipadangay a tandaw o Atolanay a finawlan ko ka adihayay, sa masaniyaro to koyo i Dipongan. i ka'etip no Ruisui syataw ko Onsing a niyaro', i kawili no Hong-ye 'alo, i satimol no Hoto 虎頭 a lotok. na itira i Ruisi 瑞西a niyaro' , Ruisiang 瑞祥a niyaro' i matini. O kasiikedan no niyaro' O Onsing a niyaro' itini i kohokho no Ruisui syang 瑞穗鄉 no Hualien-Syen 花蓮縣 ko Onsing a niyaro,ira ko nano Dipongan ho Fa'etay-Nanom itini, sa panganan han to Onsing,itini i, iraay ho a ma'osaw ko nipatirengan ho no Dipong a loma', o Hongyie-Onsing hananay. Hon-ye a Onsing , o koyo ko mapangngana i 'ayaw ho, Ku-le 古樂 a niyaro' han no Rinpon a tamdaw, tada adihayay ko lokdaw tora pala sanay a sowal no likisi. onsing a niyaro' o kamaro'an no 'Amis a tamdaw, ira ko fangcalay a rayray, a kimad ato kapahay a talo'an no niyaro'. mipalosiyan to nitayalan ato sakafangcal no kamaro'an, mala kasa'opoan no citanengay to nakamayan, o folis no rayray a losid ato misafaelohan to nikawitan a tatayalen, no serangawan a radiw ato kero i matini. Hong-ye a onsing O noising no Hualien-Syen 花蓮縣, ora ma'araway a noising i, ira ko tolo a noising itini , pakayni piceleman no onsing, o Ruysuy onsing, o Hon-ye onsing ato Antong onsing. 1991 mihecan a masanga' na Ripong to Hong-ye a onsing, I'ayaw no mihofoc, o sowal a cecay, pararir tayri i onsing no Hon-ye to tatiretiregan, midoedo toni a lekakawa no Taywan , ta mihofoc to fa'inayan a wawa saan ko sowal. O nikalopisak no Onsing Itiniay i Ruisui-Syang Cen no Hualien-Syen ko Onsing a niyaro', 424 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 979 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 29% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 283 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 20%, Bunun 1%,Truku 1%, roma 1%. O finacadan no Yincomin O Siwkolan a 'Amis hananay ko Onsing a niyaro' , o Siwkolan a 'Amis han ko Onsing a niyaro' , nano to'as ho kita o 'Amis na itiniay to i kalala'ed no matelengay i sifo no Taywan a lotok. Itiniay i sa'amisan ira ko Fo-ming a niyaro 富民村, i satimolan ira ko Olalip 屋拉力 a niyaro'. iraay to Kiwit a niyaro', Olaw a niyaro', Olalip niyaro', Kalala a niyaro', Sapat a niyaro', Atolan a niyaro', Langas a niyaro', Lacihakan a niyaro' , Koyo a niyaro' ato Morocan a niyaro, falo a niyaro' ko kasaniyaro'aro' i Ruysuy-syang. O pitooran no finawlan mamaan ca ko deamk no sapitolon ko niyaro'. pakayni sa'opo no kinkay,malosakarikec sto sakarakat no 'orip no Yincomin, ano iraay ko adada, o pades ato ira ko tatiihay a manmaan a demakan, maemin mitahidang to kiwkay mipadang. o pitooran ko finawlan no Onsing i, ora ma'araway a kiwkay i, ira ko tosa a kinkay , o tingsikiw ato ciwlokiwkay, o ciwlokiwkay a tamdaw ko ka adihay.
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u o~unsiŋ == o~u ŋaŋan no~u ko~ujo~u ħan no~u ʡamis, taɬ~ɮa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ko~ujo~u i to~uko~us saan no~u so~uwaɾ to~u to~uʡas. na i wan-ɾo~uŋ-sjaŋ *** ħo~u ko~u aro~uʡ naŋra i ʡajaw ħo~u. nawħani maɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮaj na po~uno~uŋ ko~u nijaro~uʡ naŋra , o~urasaka maɾinaħ sato~uko~u finawɾan to~unini a kapaħaj a paɾa. mamitao~uʡ ħo~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan i ti:jaħo~u, maʡaraw naŋra to~u o~unsiŋ ħananaj a sapitanəktək to~u tirəŋaj a nano~um. ħaratəŋən ħan naŋra samaanən ko~una o~unsiŋ ħani ? saka mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u finawɾan no~u ʡamis a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ a misaŋaʡ to~u o~unsiŋ a kinaira. saka mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u finawɾan no~u ʡamis to~u mipaɬ~ɮaŋ ato~u misaŋaʡ to~u o~unsiŋ ħanajnaj a . o~u mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj a tanɬ~ɮaw o~u ato~uɾanaj a finawɾan ko~u ka aɬ~ɮiħajaj, sa masanijaro~u to~u ko~ujo~u i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋan. i kaʡətip no~u ro~u~uiso~u~ui sjataw ko~u o~unsiŋ a nijaro~uʡ, i kawiɾi no~u ħo~uŋ-jə ʡaɾo~u, i satimo~uɾ no~u ħo~uto~u ** a ɾo~uto~uk. na itira i ro~u~uisi **a nijaro~uʡ , ro~u~uisiaŋ **a nijaro~uʡ i matini. o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u o~unsiŋ a nijaro~uʡ itini i ko~uħo~ukħo~u no~u ro~u~uiso~u~ui sjaŋ *** no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sjən *** ko~u o~unsiŋ a nijaro~u,ira ko~u nano~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋan ħo~u faʡətaj-nano~um itini, sa paŋanan ħan to~u o~unsiŋ,itini i, iraaj ħo~u a maʡo~usaw ko~u nipatirəŋan ħo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ɾo~umaʡ, o~u ħo~uŋjiə-o~unsiŋ ħananaj. ħo~un-jə a o~unsiŋ , o~u ko~ujo~u ko~u mapaŋŋana i ʡajaw ħo~u, ko~u~u-ɾə ** a nijaro~uʡ ħan no~u rinpo~un a tamɬ~ɮaw, taɬ~ɮa aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u ɾo~ukɬ~ɮaw to~ura paɾa sanaj a so~uwaɾ no~u ɾikisi. o~unsiŋ a nijaro~uʡ o~u kamaro~uʡan no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, ira ko~u faŋʦaɾaj a rajraj, a kimaɬ~ɮ ato~u kapaħaj a taɾo~uʡan no~u nijaro~uʡ. mipaɾo~usijan to~u nitajaɾan ato~u sakafaŋʦaɾ no~u kamaro~uʡan, maɾa kasaʡo~upo~uan no~u ʦitanəŋaj to~u nakamajan, o~u fo~uɾis no~u rajraj a ɾo~usiɬ~ɮ ato~u misafaəɾo~uħan to~u nikawitan a tatajaɾən, no~u səraŋawan a raɬ~ɮiw ato~u kəro~u i matini. ħo~uŋ-jə a o~unsiŋ o~u no~uisiŋ no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sjən ***, o~ura maʡarawaj a no~uisiŋ i, ira ko~u to~uɾo~u a no~uisiŋ itini , pakajni piʦəɾəman no~u o~unsiŋ, o~u ro~u~ujso~u~uj o~unsiŋ, o~u ħo~un-jə o~unsiŋ ato~u anto~uŋ o~unsiŋ. **** miħəʦan a masaŋaʡ na ripo~uŋ to~u ħo~uŋ-jə a o~unsiŋ, iʡajaw no~u miħo~ufo~uʦ, o~u so~uwaɾ a ʦəʦaj, pararir tajri i o~unsiŋ no~u ħo~un-jə to~u tatirətirə*an, miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~uni a ɾəkakawa no~u tajwan , ta miħo~ufo~uʦ to~u faʡinajan a wawa saan ko~u so~uwaɾ. o~u nikaɾo~upisak no~u o~unsiŋ itiniaj i ro~u~uiso~u~ui-sjaŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sjən ko~u o~unsiŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%,tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umin o~u siwko~uɾan a ʡamis ħananaj ko~u o~unsiŋ a nijaro~uʡ , o~u siwko~uɾan a ʡamis ħan ko~u o~unsiŋ a nijaro~uʡ , nano~u to~uʡas ħo~u kita o~u ʡamis na itiniaj to~u i kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u matəɾəŋaj i sifo~u no~u tajwan a ɾo~uto~uk. itiniaj i saʡamisan ira ko~u fo~u-miŋ a nijaro~u ***, i satimo~uɾan ira ko~u o~uɾaɾip *** a nijaro~uʡ. iraaj to~u kiwit a nijaro~uʡ, o~uɾaw a nijaro~uʡ, o~uɾaɾip nijaro~uʡ, kaɾaɾa a nijaro~uʡ, sapat a nijaro~uʡ, ato~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ, ɾaŋas a nijaro~uʡ, ɾaʦiħakan a nijaro~uʡ , ko~ujo~u a nijaro~uʡ ato~u mo~uro~uʦan a nijaro~u, faɾo~u a nijaro~uʡ ko~u kasanijaro~uʡaro~uʡ i ro~u~ujso~u~uj-sjaŋ. o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan mamaan ʦa ko~u ɬ~ɮəamk no~u sapito~uɾo~un ko~u nijaro~uʡ. pakajni saʡo~upo~u no~u kinkaj,maɾo~usakarikəʦ sto~u sakarakat no~u ʡo~urip no~u jinʦo~umin, ano~u iraaj ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, o~u paɬ~ɮəs ato~u ira ko~u tatiiħaj a manmaan a ɬ~ɮəmakan, maəmin mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kiwkaj mipaɬ~ɮaŋ. o~u pito~uo~uran ko~u finawɾan no~u o~unsiŋ i, o~ura maʡarawaj a kiwkaj i, ira ko~u to~usa a kinkaj , o~u tiŋsikiw ato~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwkaj, o~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwkaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ka aɬ~ɮiħaj.
S.FORM: == O ngangan no Onsing == O ngangan no Koyo han no 'Amis, tada adihay ko koyo i tokos saan no sowal to to'as. na i Wan-long-syang 萬榮鄉 ho ko aro' nangra i 'ayaw ho. nawhani malooday na Ponong ko niyaro' nangra , orasaka malinah satoko finawlan tonini a kapahay a pala. mamitao' ho ko Dipong to Taywan i ti:yaho, ma'araw nangra to Onsing hananay a sapitanektek to tirengay a nanom. haratengen han nangra samaanen kona Onsing hani ? saka mitahidangay to finawlan no 'Amis a mipadang a misanga' to Onsing a kinaira. saka mitahidangay to finawlan no 'Amis to mipadang ato misanga' to Onsing hanaynay a . o mipadangay a tandaw o Atolanay a finawlan ko ka adihayay, sa masaniyaro to koyo i Dipongan. i ka'etip no Ruisui syataw ko Onsing a niyaro', i kawili no Hong-ye 'alo, i satimol no Hoto 虎頭 a lotok. na itira i Ruisi 瑞西a niyaro' , Ruisiang 瑞祥a niyaro' i matini. O kasiikedan no niyaro' O Onsing a niyaro' itini i kohokho no Ruisui syang 瑞穗鄉 no Hualien-Syen 花蓮縣 ko Onsing a niyaro,ira ko nano Dipongan ho Fa'etay-Nanom itini, sa panganan han to Onsing,itini i, iraay ho a ma'osaw ko nipatirengan ho no Dipong a loma', o Hongyie-Onsing hananay. Hon-ye a Onsing , o koyo ko mapangngana i 'ayaw ho, Ku-le 古樂 a niyaro' han no Rinpon a tamdaw, tada adihayay ko lokdaw tora pala sanay a sowal no likisi. onsing a niyaro' o kamaro'an no 'Amis a tamdaw, ira ko fangcalay a rayray, a kimad ato kapahay a talo'an no niyaro'. mipalosiyan to nitayalan ato sakafangcal no kamaro'an, mala kasa'opoan no citanengay to nakamayan, o folis no rayray a losid ato misafaelohan to nikawitan a tatayalen, no serangawan a radiw ato kero i matini. Hong-ye a onsing O noising no Hualien-Syen 花蓮縣, ora ma'araway a noising i, ira ko tolo a noising itini , pakayni piceleman no onsing, o Ruysuy onsing, o Hon-ye onsing ato Antong onsing. 1991 mihecan a masanga' na Ripong to Hong-ye a onsing, I'ayaw no mihofoc, o sowal a cecay, pararir tayri i onsing no Hon-ye to tatiretiregan, midoedo toni a lekakawa no Taywan , ta mihofoc to fa'inayan a wawa saan ko sowal. O nikalopisak no Onsing Itiniay i Ruisui-Syang Cen no Hualien-Syen ko Onsing a niyaro', 424 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 979 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 29% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 283 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 20%, Bunun 1%,Truku 1%, roma 1%. O finacadan no Yincomin O Siwkolan a 'Amis hananay ko Onsing a niyaro' , o Siwkolan a 'Amis han ko Onsing a niyaro' , nano to'as ho kita o 'Amis na itiniay to i kalala'ed no matelengay i sifo no Taywan a lotok. Itiniay i sa'amisan ira ko Fo-ming a niyaro 富民村, i satimolan ira ko Olalip 屋拉力 a niyaro'. iraay to Kiwit a niyaro', Olaw a niyaro', Olalip niyaro', Kalala a niyaro', Sapat a niyaro', Atolan a niyaro', Langas a niyaro', Lacihakan a niyaro' , Koyo a niyaro' ato Morocan a niyaro, falo a niyaro' ko kasaniyaro'aro' i Ruysuy-syang. O pitooran no finawlan mamaan ca ko deamk no sapitolon ko niyaro'. pakayni sa'opo no kinkay,malosakarikec sto sakarakat no 'orip no Yincomin, ano iraay ko adada, o pades ato ira ko tatiihay a manmaan a demakan, maemin mitahidang to kiwkay mipadang. o pitooran ko finawlan no Onsing i, ora ma'araway a kiwkay i, ira ko tosa a kinkay , o tingsikiw ato ciwlokiwkay, o ciwlokiwkay a tamdaw ko ka adihay.
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u o~unsiŋ == o~u ŋaŋan no~u ko~ujo~u ħan no~u ʡamis, taɬ~ɮa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ko~ujo~u i to~uko~us saan no~u so~uwaɾ to~u to~uʡas. na i wan-ɾo~uŋ-sjaŋ *** ħo~u ko~u aro~uʡ naŋra i ʡajaw ħo~u. nawħani maɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮaj na po~uno~uŋ ko~u nijaro~uʡ naŋra , o~urasaka maɾinaħ sato~uko~u finawɾan to~unini a kapaħaj a paɾa. mamitao~uʡ ħo~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u tajwan i ti:jaħo~u, maʡaraw naŋra to~u o~unsiŋ ħananaj a sapitanəktək to~u tirəŋaj a nano~um. ħaratəŋən ħan naŋra samaanən ko~una o~unsiŋ ħani ? saka mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u finawɾan no~u ʡamis a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ a misaŋaʡ to~u o~unsiŋ a kinaira. saka mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u finawɾan no~u ʡamis to~u mipaɬ~ɮaŋ ato~u misaŋaʡ to~u o~unsiŋ ħanajnaj a . o~u mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj a tanɬ~ɮaw o~u ato~uɾanaj a finawɾan ko~u ka aɬ~ɮiħajaj, sa masanijaro~u to~u ko~ujo~u i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋan. i kaʡətip no~u ro~u~uiso~u~ui sjataw ko~u o~unsiŋ a nijaro~uʡ, i kawiɾi no~u ħo~uŋ-jə ʡaɾo~u, i satimo~uɾ no~u ħo~uto~u ** a ɾo~uto~uk. na itira i ro~u~uisi **a nijaro~uʡ , ro~u~uisiaŋ **a nijaro~uʡ i matini. o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u o~unsiŋ a nijaro~uʡ itini i ko~uħo~ukħo~u no~u ro~u~uiso~u~ui sjaŋ *** no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sjən *** ko~u o~unsiŋ a nijaro~u,ira ko~u nano~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋan ħo~u faʡətaj-nano~um itini, sa paŋanan ħan to~u o~unsiŋ,itini i, iraaj ħo~u a maʡo~usaw ko~u nipatirəŋan ħo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a ɾo~umaʡ, o~u ħo~uŋjiə-o~unsiŋ ħananaj. ħo~un-jə a o~unsiŋ , o~u ko~ujo~u ko~u mapaŋŋana i ʡajaw ħo~u, ko~u~u-ɾə ** a nijaro~uʡ ħan no~u rinpo~un a tamɬ~ɮaw, taɬ~ɮa aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u ɾo~ukɬ~ɮaw to~ura paɾa sanaj a so~uwaɾ no~u ɾikisi. o~unsiŋ a nijaro~uʡ o~u kamaro~uʡan no~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw, ira ko~u faŋʦaɾaj a rajraj, a kimaɬ~ɮ ato~u kapaħaj a taɾo~uʡan no~u nijaro~uʡ. mipaɾo~usijan to~u nitajaɾan ato~u sakafaŋʦaɾ no~u kamaro~uʡan, maɾa kasaʡo~upo~uan no~u ʦitanəŋaj to~u nakamajan, o~u fo~uɾis no~u rajraj a ɾo~usiɬ~ɮ ato~u misafaəɾo~uħan to~u nikawitan a tatajaɾən, no~u səraŋawan a raɬ~ɮiw ato~u kəro~u i matini. ħo~uŋ-jə a o~unsiŋ o~u no~uisiŋ no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sjən ***, o~ura maʡarawaj a no~uisiŋ i, ira ko~u to~uɾo~u a no~uisiŋ itini , pakajni piʦəɾəman no~u o~unsiŋ, o~u ro~u~ujso~u~uj o~unsiŋ, o~u ħo~un-jə o~unsiŋ ato~u anto~uŋ o~unsiŋ. **** miħəʦan a masaŋaʡ na ripo~uŋ to~u ħo~uŋ-jə a o~unsiŋ, iʡajaw no~u miħo~ufo~uʦ, o~u so~uwaɾ a ʦəʦaj, pararir tajri i o~unsiŋ no~u ħo~un-jə to~u tatirətirə*an, miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~uni a ɾəkakawa no~u tajwan , ta miħo~ufo~uʦ to~u faʡinajan a wawa saan ko~u so~uwaɾ. o~u nikaɾo~upisak no~u o~unsiŋ itiniaj i ro~u~uiso~u~ui-sjaŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sjən ko~u o~unsiŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%,tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umin o~u siwko~uɾan a ʡamis ħananaj ko~u o~unsiŋ a nijaro~uʡ , o~u siwko~uɾan a ʡamis ħan ko~u o~unsiŋ a nijaro~uʡ , nano~u to~uʡas ħo~u kita o~u ʡamis na itiniaj to~u i kaɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u matəɾəŋaj i sifo~u no~u tajwan a ɾo~uto~uk. itiniaj i saʡamisan ira ko~u fo~u-miŋ a nijaro~u ***, i satimo~uɾan ira ko~u o~uɾaɾip *** a nijaro~uʡ. iraaj to~u kiwit a nijaro~uʡ, o~uɾaw a nijaro~uʡ, o~uɾaɾip nijaro~uʡ, kaɾaɾa a nijaro~uʡ, sapat a nijaro~uʡ, ato~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ, ɾaŋas a nijaro~uʡ, ɾaʦiħakan a nijaro~uʡ , ko~ujo~u a nijaro~uʡ ato~u mo~uro~uʦan a nijaro~u, faɾo~u a nijaro~uʡ ko~u kasanijaro~uʡaro~uʡ i ro~u~ujso~u~uj-sjaŋ. o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan mamaan ʦa ko~u ɬ~ɮəamk no~u sapito~uɾo~un ko~u nijaro~uʡ. pakajni saʡo~upo~u no~u kinkaj,maɾo~usakarikəʦ sto~u sakarakat no~u ʡo~urip no~u jinʦo~umin, ano~u iraaj ko~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, o~u paɬ~ɮəs ato~u ira ko~u tatiiħaj a manmaan a ɬ~ɮəmakan, maəmin mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kiwkaj mipaɬ~ɮaŋ. o~u pito~uo~uran ko~u finawɾan no~u o~unsiŋ i, o~ura maʡarawaj a kiwkaj i, ira ko~u to~usa a kinkaj , o~u tiŋsikiw ato~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwkaj, o~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwkaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ka aɬ~ɮiħaj.
